scenarios.name: Hindi complaint
scenarios.description: Customer complaint in Hindi about failed transaction
scenarios.example_utterance: Mera account se paisa kat gaya lekin transfer nahi hua

scenarios.name: Indian English inquiry
scenarios.description: Account balance inquiry in Indian-accented English
scenarios.example_utterance: I'd like to check my savings account balance please

scenarios.name: Hindi-English code-mixed complaint
scenarios.description: Code-mixed Hindi-English complaint about pending payment
scenarios.example_utterance: Sir mera credit card ka bill payment hogaya tha but still showing pending hai

scenarios.name: Noisy environment
scenarios.description: Banking queries with background noise simulating call center/phone line
